mapper.select: SELECT cr.id, cr.kakao_place_id AS kakaoPlaceId, cr.record_type AS recordType, cr.display_order AS displayOrder, cr.created_at AS createdAt, cr.updated_at AS updatedAt, cn.title, cn.note_text AS noteText FROM cafe_record cr INNER JOIN cafe_note cn ON cn.cafe_record_id = cr.id WHERE cr.app_user_id = #{appUserId} AND cr.kakao_place_id = #{kakaoPlaceId} AND cr.record_type = 'TEXT' ORDER BY cr.display_order ASC, cr.id ASC

SELECT cr.id, cr.app_user_id AS appUserId, cr.kakao_place_id AS kakaoPlaceId, cr.record_type AS recordType, cr.display_order AS displayOrder, cr.created_at AS createdAt, cr.updated_at AS updatedAt, cn.title, cn.note_text AS noteText FROM cafe_record cr INNER JOIN cafe_note cn ON cn.cafe_record_id = cr.id WHERE cr.app_user_id = #{appUserId} AND cr.id = #{recordId} AND cr.record_type = 'TEXT'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cafe_record ( app_user_id, kakao_place_id, record_type, display_order ) VALUES ( #{appUserId}, #{kakaoPlaceId}, #{recordType}, #{displayOrder} )
mapper.update: UPDATE cafe_record SET display_order = #{displayOrder}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{recordId}
UPDATE cafe_note SET title = #{title}, note_text = #{noteText}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE cafe_record_id = #{recordId}
